== Notes for [[Item:Q3354|Q3354]] ==

Provincial Mayor of Santiago de los Caballeros various times according to page 3 in the Meritos of his son Garcia Polanco

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/show/238127

He appears on the list of rescatadores of 1594 along with his brother Garcia Perez Polanco. [https://en.calameo.com/read/000345214ba22b5666e13 Rodriguez Demorizi, Emilio "Relaciones Historicas de Santo Domingo. Vol II"] (p.156-160)

In the census of 1605, he figures as resident of Santiago de los Caballeros (attached)

Juan Sanchez de Onsijera Polanco was the owner of hatos and estancias in Santiago and La Vega (Demorizi, Relaciones Historicas II p. 432-433, 435),

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA69CA41EFBBFA9822EF79916C9761
geni:6000000072983167822


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
